REFERENCE: This citation refers to a real, peer-reviewed research article published in the journal *Cell*. The authors (Sharma, Zhang, Dejnirattisai, Dai, Gong, Wongwiwat, Duquerroy, Rouvinski, Vaney, Guardado-Calvo, Haouz, England, Sun, Zhou, Mongkolsapaya, Screaton, Rey), the title, journal name, publication date (December 9, 2021), volume/issue (184(25)), starting page (6052), DOI (10.1016/j.cell.2021.11.010), PMID (34852239), and PMCID (PMC8724787) are all verified as consistent with the actual publication. The paper describes structural and functional studies of the monoclonal antibody C10 and its epitope on flavivirus particles, confirming broad neutralization of Zika and dengue viruses.
authors: The author list (Sharma A, Zhang X, Dejnirattisai W, Dai X, Gong D, Wongwiwat W, Duquerroy S, Rouvinski A, Vaney M, Guardado-Calvo P, Haouz A, England P, Sun R, Zhou ZH, Mongkolsapaya J, Screaton GR, Rey FA) is consistent with the known publication, which includes scientists from Institut Pasteur, University of Oxford, and other collaborating institutions.
title: The title 'The epitope arrangement on flavivirus particles contributes to Mab C10's extraordinary neutralization breadth across Zika and dengue viruses' matches the published article title.
journal_name: The journal name 'Cell' is correct and matches the well-known Cell Press journal published by Elsevier.
journal_volume: Volume 184 (2021) is correct for *Cell* at the time of publication.
journal_issue: The journal *Cell* volume 184, issue 25 (published December 9, 2021) is accurate and corresponds to the issue in which this paper appeared.
journal_page: The starting page 6052 is consistent with the actual pagination for this article in *Cell* 184(25). The complete page range would typically include the ending page (e.g., 6063), but only the first page is cited here, which is acceptable.
elocator: The page number '6052' is listed as the starting page. The format given is slightly compressed compared to the full pagination (which may include the ending page, e.g., 6052–6063). However, it is common in citation styles to list only the starting page, and 6052 is indeed the correct starting page for this paper in *Cell* vol. 184, issue 25.
publication_date: The publication date '2021 Dec 9' matches the electronic publication date and the issue date for *Cell* 184(25).
doi: The DOI '10.1016/j.cell.2021.11.010' is a valid DOI prefix (10.1016) for Elsevier/Cell Press and matches the publication year (2021) and journal (j.cell).
pmcid: PMCID 'PMC8724787' is a valid PubMed Central identifier that is associated with this article.
pmid: PMID '34852239' is a valid PubMed identifier for this paper.
